summary: First-finish smoke verified for Inkwell Round-5. Login chain → dashboard → native-form doc creation → editor → Hocuspocus presence + Yjs persistence all work end-to-end. Backend auth guards return correct 401 on unauthenticated /api/documents. Footer attribution & social links correct. Deeper collab (2-user), AI panel, snapshot diff/restore, RBAC viewer-403, zod 400 (sync route gates on auth first → 401), tenant 404, and oversize 413 were not exhaustively executed in this latency-sensitive pass and are deferred to full QA.
passed: Editor surface mounts; typing persists across reload (Yjs + server sync)
presence-count shows '0 live' when alone (correct: counts OTHER peers)
Footer: author 'Pritam Roy Choudhury', github.com/PRC-Projects, linkedin.com/in/pritam-roy-choudhury all present
notes: POST /api/documents/{id}/sync with malformed JSON returned 401 (auth runs before zod). Not a bug — order is correct; zod-400 path only reachable with a valid session and was not tested in this pass.
Two-user live collab, AI summarize/grammar, snapshot diff/restore + Gemini explain, RBAC viewer 403, tenant 404, oversize 413 were NOT executed — deferred to full testing.
